title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at SSC Tube South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at SSC Tube South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube South Asia Partners:
SSC Tube South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube South Asia Partners!
